title: unbirthday suit #sr
body:
lyrics

i know what i'm doing today
now i can pick out clothes
but i'm not leaving right away
so i'll wait to put on those

if you come over now
you might find me nude
but i will not hide myself
just to comfort you

i'm at home inside my skin
it ain't too think, it ain't too thin
it's perfect for me to live in
so i'm going wear it out
yeah i'm going wear it out
yeah i'm going wear it ouuuttt
